title: Deadeye Mod [OUTDATED]
description: Adds Dead Eye Targeting from the Red Dead Redemption series.
body:
Deadeye Mod

# WARNING: Deadeye Mod is now replaced by [Dead Eye](https://modrinth.com/mod/dead-eye). This version won't get updates anymore.


Adds Dead Eye from Red Dead Redemption to Minecraft with gun mod support


* Weapon in the video is from Red Dead Weaponry, a Vic's Point Blank addon.

Warning for 1.20.1 1.20.1 backport requires g4mespeed mod.

Features

  • Near identical recreation of Dead Eye mechanics, sound and visual effects.
  • Tonics and provisions to boost your Deadeye core and meter. (See below)
  • Using bows in Deadeye will let you pull back your bow faster.
  • Fully supports Vic’s Point Blank, Timeless and Classics Zero (1.20.1) (TACZ DROPPED FABRIC SUPPORT) and Simple Animated Guns (1.20.1) weapons.
  • A quickdraw button to quickly draw the first weapon in your hotbar with Deadeye, letting you instantly shoot.
  • Lots of customization settings in the config.

Items

*note: item and block textures are placeholders for now*

Tobacco

Found in the wild, tobacco is a crop that can be farmed like other crops. Used to craft mod’s items.

Snake Oil Tonic

Snake Oil Tonic will refill and fortify your Deadeye Meter. Crafted by smelting the mix of water bottle and tobacco. Amount of tobacco used will give different levels of fortification. (with a limit of 3)

Cigarette

Cigarette can be used to fill your Deadeye Core. Crafted from tobacco and paper.

Chewing Tobacco

Chewing tobacco can be used to fortify your Deadeye Meter in return, your Deadeye Core will get damaged slightly. Crafted by smelting tobacco.
